name: benzoic-acid_pka_acidity
prompt: Run the pka-acidity task for benzoic acid using the GFN2-xTB method in implicit water (reference mode). Pass the protonated form with --ha and the deprotonated form with --a-minus. Use reference mode anchored against acetic acid (experimental pKa 4.76): pass --ref-ha and --ref-a-minus for acetic acid/acetate and --pka-ref 4.76. Report the aqueous pKa as the headline value, and state the method, mode, and charges used. Note xtb reference pKa is ~±2 units. Use the chemkit tools; do not guess the number.
